name: studio.get_scaffold_status
description: Poll an async Actium Studio scaffold job by id and return its current status, progress, and per-step timing.
whenToUse: studio.scaffold_site returned 202 with a job_id and the agent needs to wait for 'ready' before continuing.
Operator wants a progress update on an in-flight scaffold (UI polling, status line).
Failure diagnosis: a scaffold reported 'failed' — fetch the job to surface which step failed and why.
whenNotToUse: Caller has no job_id — this is a polling companion; scaffold must be started first with studio.scaffold_site.
Polling every <1s in a tight loop — the endpoint is cheap but not free; back off to 2-5s intervals.
Caller wants site health info (uptime, page counts) — use studio.site_status instead; this skill is scaffold-job-specific.
